content:
- continued task 24 from TO BE VERIFIED state, ran deep skeptical verification across harness/e2e/dcs/ports/make gates, and rewrote the task plan to Draft 2 with explicit delta: preserve single-member etcd wrappers while adding additive cluster APIs; also changed no-quorum semantics to stop etcd majority (2/3)
- implemented full NOW EXECUTE changes: added clustered etcd harness in src/test_harness/etcd3.rs (cluster/member specs, cluster handle, shutdown_member/shutdown_all, per-member data dirs, readiness probe, partial-start cleanup), added topology port planner in src/test_harness/ports.rs, and migrated src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs to 3 etcd members + endpoint vectors + majority-stop fail-safe path + cluster-safe teardown
- validated with required gates successfully: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint all pass; also captured evidence logs and marker grep outputs under .ralph/evidence/story-rust-system-harness/24-task-real-e2e-harness-3nodes-3etcd/
- updated task 24 metadata/checklist to done/passing and added a cross-task learning in AGENTS.md about additive cluster APIs to preserve compatibility
- ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh after completion as required
- next step if continuing loop after this commit: pick up the new .ralph/current_task.txt target and start from plan/verify/execute state there

- Read prior progress and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md fully.
- Applied selection rules: no failing bug tasks, so moved to non-passing tasks; meta-task exists but is lower priority than actual <passes>false</passes> tasks.
- Inspected all false tasks for explicit <priority>; none present. Chose task 25 because it is unblocked and unlocks the largest downstream chain (26, 27, and part of 30). Wrote path to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Received PO mail asking what `test bdd` does and to make it also run e2e from one command.
- Replied to PO immediately, then inspected Makefile: `test-bdd` only ran bdd_state_watch + bdd_api_http; real e2e was only in `test-real`.
- Edited Makefile `test-bdd` target to add `PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES=1 cargo test --all-targets ha::e2e_multi_node::e2e_multi_node_real_ha_scenario_matrix`.
- Ran `make test-bdd`; BDD tests passed and real e2e scenario passed in same run.
- Sent multiple progress emails + final summary email confirming one `test-bdd` command now includes e2e.
- Next step if continued: decide whether to also fold the rest of `test-real` probes into `test-bdd` or keep only e2e in bdd as currently requested.

- Started new active task from .ralph/current_task.txt: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/25-task-enforce-e2e-api-only-control-no-direct-dcs.md
- Read prior progress memory and then performed a broad parallel research scan across e2e/API/controller/BDD/make/task files.
- Confirmed direct DCS mutation regressions still exist in src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs (write_path/delete_path and controller-level mutation path) and no existing policy guard test currently blocks this.
- Confirmed required API endpoints and constraints: /switchover, /ha/leader set/delete, /ha/state; also validated /ha/state needs snapshot subscriber wiring.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 execution plan into task 25 including architecture changes, phased execution, planned parallel tracks, and skeptical verification protocol.
- Added lifecycle marker TO BE VERIFIED at end of task file exactly as required.
- Stopping immediately after planning phase per workflow; next run should perform deep skeptical verification with 16+ parallel tracks and alter at least one plan item before promoting to NOW EXECUTE.

- Received PO mail asking whether all tests pass, how many `test-bdd` runs, how many are not run vs full suite, and whether one command can force all tests (unit+bdd+e2e, no exceptions).
- Followed mail workflow with frequent updates: sent immediate ack, plan update, subtask start updates, subtask completion update, and final summary mail.
- Ran `make test-bdd` and captured fresh output in `/tmp/make-test-bdd-current.log`:
  - bdd_api_http: 6 passed
  - bdd_state_watch: 1 passed
  - filtered all-targets e2e selector: 1 passed (`ha::e2e_multi_node::e2e_multi_node_real_ha_scenario_matrix`), with 148+6+1 filtered in non-selected binaries.
  - total executed by `test-bdd`: 8.
- Ran full forced suite `PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES=1 cargo test --all-targets` and captured `/tmp/cargo-test-all-current.log`:
  - 149 + 6 + 1 = 156 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored.
- Enumerated tests via `cargo test --all-targets -- --list` and validated workspace inventory matches 156 tests.
- Checked accidental skip markers with `rg -n "#\\[ignore" src tests examples` and found none.
- Final answer sent to PO: all tests currently pass; `test-bdd` executes 8; 148 not executed relative to full 156; accidental skipped count 0; one-command full run is `PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES=1 cargo test --all-targets -- --include-ignored`.
- No code changes made.
